use_cases: Displaying blog post previews with images and category tags in a grid layout
Showcasing content collections with hover lift animations for interactivity
Featuring latest articles or news on content-heavy websites and blogs
Creating visually organized content sections with thumbnail images
Building landing page content sections with branded typography
ai_summary: A clean blog post card component featuring image thumbnails, titles, and category labels arranged in a responsive grid. Uses subtle hover lift animations with smooth transitions, Poppins typography, and Tailwind CSS for styling. Designed for content-heavy platforms like blogs, news sites, and media publications.
